mapper.select: SELECT b2.target_id AS contentId, SUM( (CASE UPPER(TRIM(b2.behavior_type)) WHEN 'VIEW' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'LIKE' THEN 3.0 WHEN 'COLLECT' THEN 4.0 WHEN 'COMMENT' THEN 2.5 ELSE 1.0 END) * EXP(-GREATEST(0, DATEDIFF(NOW(), b2.create_time)) / 30.0) ) AS score FROM user_behavior b1 INNER JOIN user_behavior b2 ON b1.user_id = b2.user_id AND b2.target_type = 'CONTENT' AND b2.target_id != b1.target_id WHERE b1.target_type = 'CONTENT' AND b1.target_id = #{contentId} GROUP BY b2.target_id ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT k.category_id FROM user_behavior ub INNER JOIN knowledge_content k ON ub.target_id = k.id AND ub.target_type = 'CONTENT' WHERE ub.user_id = #{userId} AND k.deleted = 0 AND k.status = 1 AND k.category_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY k.category_id ORDER BY SUM( (CASE UPPER(TRIM(ub.behavior_type)) WHEN 'VIEW' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'LIKE' THEN 3.0 WHEN 'COLLECT' THEN 4.0 WHEN 'COMMENT' THEN 2.5 ELSE 1.0 END) * EXP(-GREATEST(0, DATEDIFF(NOW(), ub.create_time)) / 30.0) ) DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT k.title AS contentTitle, k.summary AS contentSummary FROM user_behavior ub INNER JOIN knowledge_content k ON ub.target_id = k.id AND ub.target_type = 'CONTENT' WHERE ub.user_id = #{userId} AND UPPER(TRIM(ub.behavior_type)) = 'VIEW' AND k.deleted = 0 AND k.status = 1 ORDER BY ub.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT fp.title FROM user_behavior ub INNER JOIN forum_post fp ON fp.id = ub.target_id WHERE ub.user_id = #{userId} AND (ub.target_type = 'FORUM_POST' OR ub.target_type = 'POST') AND UPPER(TRIM(ub.behavior_type)) IN ('VIEW', 'LIKE', 'COMMENT') AND fp.deleted = 0 AND fp.status = 1 ORDER BY ub.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
